title: PMS VFM - Christmas Eve Box - Small, Elf Delivery Box, Favour Boxes, Table Favours for Xmas, Christmas Eve Boxes Empty, Small Gifts, for Kids, Adults
features: FESTIVE DESIGN: This festive ‘Christmas Eve Delivery’ box is perfect for the most exciting night of the year! The festive design with Santa and friends makes it appealing and exciting.
FILL WITH TREATS: Fill this box with chocolates, sweets, reindeer food, little toys and more. The options are endless.
REUSABLE: A new tradition for your family, this box can be used again and again, year on year.
EASY TO ASSEMBLE: This flat pack, cardboard Christmas Eve box is easy to assemble.
SIZE: This box measures at 21x32x11CM. The perfect size to pop under your Christmas tree.
description: Product Description Traditional and seasonal Children and adults alike will love these decorations, with loveable illustrations of sweet, festive characters: bears, Santa and reindeers. An ideal addition to your home Christmas decoration collection. FESTIVE WALL ART Let Santa know to stop with this festive, light up Christmas sign. Spread some festive cheer with the perfect addition to your Christmas collection. SPARKLY STOCKINGS Bring a festive feel to your home with this luxury Christmas stocking. Both sophisticated and seasonal, this stocking will delight adults and children alike. CHRISTMAS HATS These festive, tartan Christmas hats can be worn for a range of occasions, including work-do’s, Christmas parties, gatherings and more, by men and women alike. CUTE STOCKINGS Bring a festive feel to your home with this adorable Christmas stocking, which will look great hanging from a mantle or next to a Christmas tree.
